title: Acceptance tests run against the full production dataset, not an empty/seeded system
evidence: acceptance_test.go:18 setupTestServer calls RegisterTools("./data/kaggle/") loading all real CSVs; tests assert on real data (e.g. acceptance_test.go:56 'should find matches for Flamengo', :83 Palmeiras 2023). ATDD prompt requires each scenario 'starts from a running but empty system and shares no data with other tests'.
suggestion: Seed each scenario with a small controlled fixture dataset instead of the shipped CSVs so assertions are deterministic and independent of dataset contents.

title: No finer-grained unit TDD beneath the acceptance suite
evidence: Only acceptance_test.go exists; `find . -name '*_test.go'` returns no other test files. ATDD prompt requires 'using finer-grained unit TDD underneath to build the internals' (e.g. NormalizeName, parseDate, matchesCompetition have no unit tests).
suggestion: Add unit tests for loader helpers (NormalizeName, parseDate, parseIntField) and the per-tool filter logic to drive the internals as the prompt prescribes.

title: Stat/standings acceptance tests assert field presence, not computed correctness
evidence: acceptance_test.go:142-155 (get_team_stats) and :262-272 (get_standings) only check keys exist and sort order; no test asserts an actual W/L/D, points, or goals value. ATDD asks tests to assert WHAT the system does in domain terms.
suggestion: Against a seeded fixture, assert concrete expected values (e.g. team X has 2 wins, 7 points) so the aggregation logic is genuinely verified.

title: find_matches silently ignores season passed as a string
evidence: internal/tools/matches.go:62 `_ = seasonStr // ignore` — only float64 season is honored; a string season is dropped with no error.
suggestion: Parse a string season via strconv.Atoi, or reject it explicitly, rather than silently ignoring the filter.

title: matchesCompetition cannot distinguish Brasileirao subsets and conflates BR-Football tournaments
evidence: internal/data/loader.go:loadBRFootball tags rows with the raw `tournament` column (or 'Brazil'); internal/tools/matches.go:matchesCompetition maps 'brasileirao' to an exact mc=='brasileirao' match, so BR-Football 'Brazil' rows are excluded from a brasileirao filter.
suggestion: Normalize competition labels at load time to the three canonical competitions so filtering is consistent across all five match files.

title: Token efficiency very low for this run
evidence: retort.db: _tokens=500612, _cost_usd=2.13, token_efficiency=0.060 — far below sibling runs; maintainability=0.46.
suggestion: Informational only — flagged for cross-run comparison; no code change required.
